=====Befriended=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Mela
|pkmn=Charcadet (multiple)

|epname=Abduction! The Target is Miraidon!!
|desc=Many {{p|Charcadet}}, including one [[nickname]]d '''Charlos''' (Japanese: '''ボウジロウ''' ''Bōjirō''), used to frequent the [[Schedar Squad's Base]] and follow Mela around. During Mela's battle with {{Violet}}, they secretly tried to help by focusing multiple {{m|Sunny Day}}s onto Violet, causing him to pass out from heatstroke. They were eventually thwarted by {{adv|Nemona}} and her {{p|Quaxwell}}. After Mela was defeated, she accepted her loss and left the base with Charlos and the other Charcadet.

Their only known move is {{m|Sunny Day}}.}}
